question: Fish allergy – can I have the Caesar dressing?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Fish allergy – can I have the Caesar dressing?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Sorry, I didn't catch that clearly. Could you repeat your order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I have a fish allergy—can I have Caesar dressing?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, but Caesar dressing contains fish — it's part of our Caesar salads which have fish. We do have Spicy Chicken Wrap that doesn't contain fish. Would you like that instead?

final_cashier_response: I'm sorry, but Caesar dressing contains fish — it's part of our Caesar salads which have fish. We do have Spicy Chicken Wrap that doesn't contain fish. Would you like that instead?
